hero.title: Building the Future of Investment & Technology
hero.subtitle: Reich Elyra is an Egyptian investment and technology company bridging innovation between Egypt and Spain across AI, LegalTech, Infrastructure, and Cloud Solutions.

about.title: About Reich Elyra
about.description: Reich Elyra is a limited liability company registered under Egypt's Investment Law 72/2017, operating at the intersection of artificial intelligence, legal technology, and cross-border investment. Founded by Ahmed Madi Farag Zeidan, we are committed to delivering enterprise-grade solutions that drive transformation across sectors.
about.location: Maadi, Cairo, Arab Republic of Egypt

innovation.title: Relentless Innovation
innovation.desc: We push the boundaries of what technology can achieve, combining cutting-edge AI with deep domain expertise to create solutions that didn't exist before.

integrity.title: Uncompromising Integrity
integrity.desc: Every decision we make is grounded in transparency, ethical governance, and full regulatory compliance across all jurisdictions we operate in.

excellence.title: Operational Excellence
excellence.desc: We deliver enterprise-grade quality in everything we build, from code architecture to client relationships, setting the standard for our industry.

bridge.title: Bridging Worlds
bridge.desc: We connect Egypt and Europe through technology and investment, creating pathways that benefit businesses, economies, and communities on both sides.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive solutions spanning technology, investment, and infrastructure

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence
ai.desc: Advanced AI systems engineered for enterprise deployment, from natural language processing to predictive analytics and intelligent automation.

legaltech.title: Legal Technology
legaltech.desc: Next-generation legal platforms that streamline compliance, contract intelligence, and regulatory navigation for organizations operating across jurisdictions.

investment.title: Investment Advisory
investment.desc: Strategic investment facilitation between Egypt and Spain, leveraging bilateral frameworks and Investment Law 72/2017 incentives for cross-border ventures.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure Development
infrastructure.desc: End-to-end infrastructure solutions encompassing digital transformation, cloud architecture, and scalable systems for emerging markets.

saas.title: Software as a Service
saas.desc: Enterprise SaaS platforms built for scale, security, and performance, serving clients across the MENA region and Southern Europe.

consulting.title: Strategic Consulting
consulting.desc: High-level advisory services for organizations navigating regulatory landscapes, market entry strategies, and technology adoption in Egypt and Spain.

vision.title: Vision & Mission
vision.visionText: To be the definitive bridge for innovation and investment between Egypt and the European Union, creating lasting value through technology that transforms industries and empowers economies.
vision.missionText: To deliver world-class AI, LegalTech, and SaaS solutions that enable organizations to operate with intelligence, compliance, and competitive advantage in an interconnected global market.
vision.visionHighlight: Connecting MENA and EU through technology

maat.title: MAAT Platform
maat.subtitle: AI-Powered Legal Intelligence
maat.description: MAAT is our flagship AI-driven legal technology platform, named after the ancient Egyptian principle of truth, justice, and order. It delivers intelligent contract analysis, regulatory compliance automation, and jurisdictional risk assessment for enterprises operating across borders.
features: Intelligent contract analysis and clause extraction powered by large language models
Automated regulatory compliance monitoring across Egyptian and EU frameworks
Jurisdictional risk scoring and cross-border legal harmonization
Predictive litigation analytics and dispute resolution intelligence

innovation.title: Innovation Hub
innovation.subtitle: Where Ancient Wisdom Meets Modern Intelligence
innovation.description: Reich Elyra operates at the frontier of technological innovation, channeling Egypt's millennia-old legacy of engineering and governance into modern solutions that serve a global market.

pillars.title: Cross-Border Intelligence
pillars.desc: Proprietary frameworks that enable seamless business operations between Egyptian and European regulatory environments.

pillars.title: AI-First Architecture
pillars.desc: Every platform we build is designed with artificial intelligence at its core, ensuring adaptive, learning systems that evolve with market demands.

pillars.title: Regulatory Technology
pillars.desc: Automated compliance engines that navigate the complexity of Investment Law 72/2017 and EU directives with precision and speed.

pillars.title: Scalable Infrastructure
pillars.desc: Cloud-native, enterprise-grade infrastructure designed for the demands of MENA and European markets at scale.

contact.subtitle: Connect with our team to explore partnership and investment opportunities

maatPage.metaDescription: MAAT is Reich Elyra's flagship AI-driven legal technology platform. Intelligent contract analysis, automated regulatory compliance, jurisdictional risk scoring, and predictive litigation analytics for cross-border enterprises.

hero.title: MAAT Platform
hero.tagline: Where Ancient Wisdom Meets Modern Intelligence
hero.subtitle: Named after the ancient Egyptian principle of truth, justice, and order — MAAT applies frontier AI to the practice of law, compliance, and cross-border governance.

capabilities.title: Built for the cross-border legal stack
capabilities.subtitle: Four engines, one platform — designed for enterprises operating between Egypt, the EU, and the wider MENA region.

items.title: Contract Intelligence
items.description: Extract obligations, parties, key dates, and risk clauses from contracts in seconds. Trained on hundreds of thousands of cross-border commercial agreements.

items.title: Regulatory Compliance Engine
items.description: Live monitoring of Egyptian Investment Law 72/2017, GDPR, MiCA, and EU directives — with automated alerts when changes affect your portfolio.

items.title: Jurisdictional Risk Scoring
items.description: Quantitative risk model mapping enforcement patterns, regulator behavior, and dispute outcomes across 24 jurisdictions.

items.title: Predictive Litigation Analytics
items.description: Forecast dispute outcomes, suggest settlement ranges, and surface precedent — grounded in real case law, not pattern-matched fluff.

useCases.title: Built for teams that operate across borders

items.name: In-house counsel at multinationals
items.description: Review hundreds of vendor contracts a quarter without missing a clause or a deadline.

items.name: Cross-border M&A advisors
items.description: Run due diligence on Egyptian and EU targets in parallel — same workspace, same risk model.

items.name: Compliance and RegTech teams
items.description: Map every regulatory change to the policies, contracts, and processes it actually affects.

items.name: Investment platforms and family offices
items.description: Underwrite cross-border deals with quantified legal and regulatory risk, not gut-feel.

steps.title: Connect your document corpus
steps.description: Securely ingest contracts, policies, and case files from your existing systems — DMS, email, SharePoint, or upload directly.

steps.title: MAAT structures and indexes everything
steps.description: Documents are parsed, clause-mapped, entity-tagged, and indexed against the regulatory graph in under five minutes per file.

steps.title: Query, monitor, and decide
steps.description: Ask natural-language questions, set up regulatory monitors, run risk scoring on new deals — all from one workspace.

items.question: When will MAAT be generally available?
items.answer: MAAT is in private preview with a small group of design partners. General availability is planned for 2026. Request early access to be considered for the next cohort.

items.question: What jurisdictions does MAAT cover today?
items.answer: The first release focuses on Egypt and the EU-27, with full coverage of Egyptian Investment Law 72/2017, GDPR, MiCA, DSA, and key sector-specific regulations. Additional jurisdictions are added quarterly.

items.question: How is MAAT priced?
items.answer: MAAT is sold as an annual enterprise subscription with seat-based and document-volume tiers. Contact our team for a tailored proposal — design partners receive preferential pricing.

items.question: Where is the data stored?
items.answer: Customer data is stored in the region of your choice (EU or MENA), encrypted at rest and in transit. MAAT supports SOC 2 controls and is being prepared for ISO 27001 audit.

items.question: Does MAAT replace our legal team?
items.answer: No. MAAT augments lawyers and compliance professionals — it handles the high-volume mechanical work so your team can focus on judgment, strategy, and client-facing work.

items.question: Can MAAT be integrated with our existing DMS or CLM?
items.answer: Yes. MAAT ships with connectors for the major DMS, CLM, and ERP systems, plus a REST API for custom integrations.

cta.title: Want a closer look?
cta.subtitle: Request early access and the MAAT team will walk you through a live demo on your own documents.
